heading: Powers
label: 60106 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6010636:4802., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–510, title XVI, § 1602104 Stat. 1736The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
